rawLog.title: Queer club night with chaotic, high-BPM sets packed with sexy, raw and unpredictable bangers. NOT ONLY BY FAGS NOT ONLY FOR FAGS! ♡
rawLog.rawText: Queer club night with chaotic, high-BPM sets packed with sexy, raw and unpredictable bangers. NOT ONLY BY FAGS NOT ONLY FOR FAGS! ♡ | Push It | Groovy dance night by residents Pushin Wood Soundsystem. With various guest DJs and live music in the night! Click here for the full dance night program. | Queerclub VERA | An event for and by people in the LGBTQIA+ community, but everyone is welcome!
